title: The People Behind Civion
subtitle: Two BUET civil engineers — same cohort, complementary disciplines — building a consultancy that covers the full project lifecycle.

members.name: Anway Dipta Paul
members.title: Co-Founder
members.bio: Anway leads the technical delivery at Civion BD, covering structural analysis and design, geotechnical FEA, and BIM coordination. He brings experience across PLAXIS, ETABS, Revit, and ISO 19650 workflows.

members.name: Imran Khan
members.title: Co-Founder
members.bio: Imran drives project coordination, client engagement, and business development at Civion BD. He manages delivery timelines, handles stakeholder communications, and contributes structural engineering expertise to select projects.

note: Both co-founders are BUET classmates — same civil engineering cohort, complementary disciplines.
